[100 Free Recruitment Event Preview]

The 100 Free Recruitment event is returning, Sensei!
Log in every day for 9 days straight to get all the rewards!

🗓️Event Period:
1/30 (Tue) After Maintenance – 2/8 (Thu) 1:59 AM (UTC)
